headline: Brokers Suggest Investing in Freeport-McMoRan (FCX): Read This Before Placing a Bet
summary: The average brokerage recommendation (ABR) for Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) is equivalent to a Buy. The overly optimistic recommendations of Wall Street analysts make the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric questionable. So, is it worth buying the stock?
